name: cursor-usage
description: Shows your Cursor IDE usage (included requests and on-demand spend) in the status bar

cursorUsage.pollInterval.description: How often to refresh usage data (in minutes)

cursorUsage.minimalMode.description: Show only the active metric: premium requests if not exhausted, or credits if premium is used up

cursorUsage.usageDuration.description: Time range for the usage-by-model breakdown in the tooltip

scripts.package: bun run build && mkdir -p build && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && bunx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies --out "build/cursor-usage-${VERSION}.vsix"
scripts.release: bun run package && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && bunx ovsx publish "build/cursor-usage-${VERSION}.vsix" -p $OPEN_VSX_TOKEN
